feed.title: Daryna Oliynyk
feed.subtitle: PhD student in machine learning security at Vienna University of Technology.

entry.title: 2nd place at the European Cybersecurity & AI Hackathon Championship

link.title: 2nd place at the European Cybersecurity & AI Hackathon Championship

entry.content:
Last weekend I joined my colleagues Tanja Sarcevic, Yelyzaveta Klysa, and Sabina Khazari at the Trustworthy AI Hackathon in Vienna, organized by CISPA Helmholtz Center for Information Security.

Out of 16 teams, we finished 2nd and advanced to the championship grand final in St. Ingbert, Germany.

More details about the event are available on the official CISPA Hackathon Championship page.
entry.summary: We finished 2nd in Vienna and advanced to the CISPA championship grand final.
